case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. LUIS MIGUEL PERAZA YAH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT YAH, LUIS MIGUEL PERAZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-29-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ENNY CUDNY, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT LUIS MIGUEL PERAZA YAH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LUIS MIGUEL YAH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
